privileged_info_summary: The task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new Change Request in ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus from scratch. It has been verified that the expected Title 'Upgrade email server from Exchange 2016 to Exchange 2019', Change Type 'Normal', Reason 'Microsoft Exchange 2016 end of support is approaching. Upgrade required to maintain security patches and vendor support.', and Impact 'Medium' exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt. Additionally, the task relies on an external VLM for evaluation, as the local verifier is a stub.
